title: Mighty Mouthwatering Kenyan Beef Buns
description: Savory and chewy Kenyan beef buns perfect for a post-workout meal, featuring a unique ttukbaegi earthenware cook method and raw-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add in the sesame oil and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape.
In a separate pan, cook the beef over high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Assemble the buns by placing a tablespoon of the beef mixture onto the center of each dough disk.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the bun.
